title: populus × serotina var. aurea
intro: Populus × serotina var. aurea, also known as golden poplar or golden cottonwood, is a hybrid plant of the Populus tremuloides and Populus alba species, characterized by its bright yellow foliage and rapid growth rate. The medicinal properties of golden poplar include its ability to act as a diuretic, reducing inflammation and relieving pain. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Golden poplar can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
